codeReview.summary: The cancellation fan-out changes synchronously cancel queued runs, mark active runs for stop-on-heartbeat behavior, and finalize the study only after active work drains. The added cancellation audit event wiring is coherent and I did not find a correctness issue in this feature.

summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit `156df60c2bf336cb1be09c6fe01a46f5b1c23160` for `cancellation-fanout`. The queued-vs-active cancellation handling matches the intended fan-out behavior and I found no code defects in this feature.
